2025-10-17.thesis: Rocket Lab signs deal with Japan's JAXA space agency
2025-10-17.exit_case: JAXA deal already signed and announced this week — the specific catalyst has occurred.
2025-10-17.assessment: Rocket Lab signed a deal with JAXA, sending shares to record highs the same week the news broke. This is a discrete, dated catalyst that has now fully resolved publicly — press coverage is already framing it as 'should you buy here' (mainstream, reactive coverage), meaning the edge of buying ahead of the announcement is gone. No scheduled next step (e.g., a specific launch date, a follow-on JAXA contract vote, or regulatory approval still pending) is cited in coverage; only generic bullishness on the broader space-stock theme remains. Per the framework, a signed/closed deal fully priced into a new ATH with no concrete next catalyst ahead means the specific thesis is resolved even though the stock may continue to run on broader momentum.
2025-10-17.exit_advice: Deal is public, stock already hit new all-time highs on the news — exit; no concrete follow-on catalyst specified beyond the signed deal.
